proposal.working_title: AI Consulting Explained: When Mid-Market Operators Should Hire a Partner Instead of Building an Internal AI Team
proposal.one_line_angle: Most mid-market AI rollouts stall because internal teams under-scope the build; here is the engagement model done-for-you operators use to decide between consulting, contracting, and hiring before committing budget.
outline_bullets: What AI consulting actually delivers (versus internal capability, contractors, and SaaS vendors), and the four-quadrant decision matrix mid-market operators use to scope the right engagement
The engagement-model playbook: discovery sprint, capability audit, build phase, embed-and-handover; with budget bands and timeline expectations for each stage
When done-for-you operators should hire a consulting partner versus spin up an internal AI lead, with three diagnostic questions and a hire-or-engage scoring rubric
proposal.cannibalization_rationale: medium: 1 match(es) | title token-set Jaccard 0.50 (post #65499 https://firstmovers.ai/consulting/)
